cross_scene_arcs.title: Avoidance of Emotional Intimacy
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Bobby consistently resists emotional connection with Rayette, Elton, and Catherine, using sarcasm, physical withdrawal, and deflection to maintain distance.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: emotionally detached in relationship with Rayette
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: emotionally isolated after Catherine ends their affair
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: inability to sustain or initiate authentic emotional engagement

cross_scene_arcs.title: Confrontation with Familial Responsibility
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Bobby resists, then reluctantly engages with the news of his father's illness, culminating in a failed attempt at reconciliation with the unresponsive Nicholas.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: avoids confronting family illness and responsibility
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: emotionally overwhelmed after apologizing to his unresponsive father
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: father remains unresponsive, no mutual understanding achieved

cross_scene_arcs.title: Erosion of Identity and Self-Deception
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Bobby's emotional detachment is exposed as a barrier to authenticity, particularly in music and relationships, leading to accusations of fakeness and personal collapse.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: exposed as emotionally detached from his talent and relationships
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: how to reconcile his abilities with his emotional numbness

cross_scene_arcs.title: Work and Peer Estrangement
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Bobby's immersion in blue-collar labor deteriorates into conflict with peers, culminating in quitting his job after Elton's accusation triggers a violent reaction.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: immersed in oil rig work and camaraderie
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: quits job and becomes estranged from Elton and Longcipher
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: avoidance of responsibility toward women and past relationships

cross_scene_arcs.title: Emotional Tension and Intimacy with Bobby
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Catherine's relationship with Bobby evolves from polite engagement to emotional conflict, brief intimacy, and eventual resolution, marked by recurring tension between attraction and loyalty.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Catherine engages Bobby in conversation as a guest in the household.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Catherine ends the romantic connection, affirming it is unworkable due to Bobby's emotional instability.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: her feelings for Bobby remain partially unprocessed, resurfacing in brief moments of eye contact and hesitation.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Conflict Between Personal Desire and Commitment to Carl
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Catherine struggles to balance her emotional and romantic connection with Bobby against her responsibilities and loyalty to Carl, culminating in a decision to end the affair.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Her personal time is constrained by Carl's schedule, limiting autonomy.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: She chooses to reaffirm her commitment to Carl and end the relationship with Bobby.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: whether she can fully return to her life with Carl after the emotional breach.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Quest for Emotional Authenticity
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Catherine seeks genuine emotional expression in her interactions, particularly through music and intimacy, but becomes disillusioned by perceived insincerity in Bobby and ultimately rejects a relationship lacking authenticity.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: She is moved by Bobby's piano playing, believing it emotionally sincere.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: She concludes the relationship is futile due to Bobby's lack of self-respect and emotional grounding.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: her own vulnerability remains guarded, suggesting ongoing difficulty in trusting emotional connection.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Status and Role Within the Dupea Household
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Catherine is integrated into the Dupea household as a quasi-family member, participating in meals and routines, with her presence shaped by Carl's care needs and artistic life.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Treated as a recognized member of the household during family meals.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Her role remains tied to Carl’s schedule and well-being, reinforcing her embedded status in the domestic structure.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: her personal autonomy is limited by her caregiving and artistic obligations.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Emotional Dependence and Rejection in Relationship with Bobby
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Rayette repeatedly seeks emotional validation and reciprocity from Bobby, expressing deep devotion and need, but is consistently met with detachment, silence, or temporary reconciliation without commitment.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Bobby's emotional unavailability and lack of reciprocal commitment

cross_scene_arcs.title: Assertion of Identity Against Class and Social Judgment
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Rayette defends her working-class experience and personal choices when challenged by Palm and the Dupea family, asserting her dignity through lived knowledge, though she remains socially marginalized.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: defensive of her work and lifestyle
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: socially out of place but verbally assertive
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: her value is not fully recognized by Bobby or his social circle

cross_scene_arcs.title: Cycles of Conflict, Confrontation, and Temporary Reconciliation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Rayette engages in escalating verbal conflicts with Bobby and Palm, asserting her needs and worth, but these confrontations are either cut short or end in unresolved tension despite moments of physical reconciliation.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: conflicts are interrupted or defused without resolution

cross_scene_arcs.title: Hope and Delusion of Lasting Connection
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Rayette maintains belief in Bobby's return and their future together, expressing it through song and active participation in shared moments, even as he repeatedly abandons or excludes her.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: uncertainty about Bobby's long-term intentions and her place in his life
